slides.title:
Your monitoring stack
is a *museum*.
slides.body: It shows what broke. At 2am it tells you nothing you can act on.

slides.title: Monitoring
slides.body: The questions you knew to ask in advance. CPU. BGP. A latency threshold.

slides.title: Observability
slides.body: The question you *didn't* pre-plan — asked mid-outage, without shipping a new sensor.

slides.title:
The tell is
the war room
slides.body: Still SSH-ing into boxes for context the dashboards never caught? That was monitoring.

slides.title:
Green wall,
*down* service
slides.body: Every part read "up" while the service was down. Nobody instrumented the relationship.

slides.title:
Which one is your
team running?
